answer: Three strategies reference the most core rules with 4 each: chan_theory [1,2,3,4], emotion_cycle [1,2,3,5], and wave_theory [1,2,3,4]. Five strategies reference 3 rules each: bull_trend, box_oscillation, shrink_pullback, ma_golden_cross, volume_breakout. Three strategies reference 2 rules each: dragon_head, one_yang_three_yin, bottom_volume. Notably, bottom_volume has the lowest rule coverage at 2 rules.
